header.description: Networking Equipment Selector knowledge base for the Cisco Meraki MS130 and MS150 Series switches (native Meraki cloud-managed access switches — distinct from the Catalyst 9200L-M/9300L-M hybrid Meraki-managed models, which live in their own C9200/C9300 KB files). Carries the catalog (atomic SKU facts), groups (named shared compatibility sets), and switch models for MS130 (compact access) and MS150 (stackable access). Structure: catalog + groups + models.

sources.name: Cisco Meraki MS130 Series Data Sheet

design_notes: Pass 1 (this pass): MS130 licensing only — catalog.licenses + groups.license_groups, from MS130 datasheet excerpts pasted into the authoring session. No PSU, stacking, or network-module data has been supplied yet, so those catalog/group arrays stay empty; 'models' stays empty until Pass 2 (MS130 switch models). MS150 (Passes 3-4) is out of scope for this pass.

'MS130' and 'MS150' were added to the 'series' enum in switching-axes.json with explicit human sign-off (structural change, per this schema's $authoring.cheap_vs_structural). No registry_version bump was made for this addition since no axis KIND/ROLE/shape changed — only its legal_values grew, matching how registry_version is scoped in this project (a bump is for a structural/typed change to the axis SET, not every enum-value addition).

MS130 classic license structure (regime meraki-classic, shape term-based): the datasheet's classic table prints the LIC-MS130-CMPT(A)/-24(A)/-48(A) base order codes each against ONE representative model row, but the 'compact switch (8/12)' / '24 ports' / '48 ports' wording in the Description column states each SKU applies to the WHOLE port-class family, not just the row it's printed on. Confirmed with the user: 'compact' = MS130-8/-8P/-8P-I/-8X/-12X (both Enterprise and Advanced SKUs available across all five); '24' = MS130-24/-24P/-24X; '48' = MS130-48/-48P/-48X. Per-term SKU strings (-1Y/-3Y/.../-10Y) are synthesized by appending suffixes to the datasheet's base order code (datasheet prints only the base code + a stated term list), mirroring the C9200L-M convention. Enterprise offers 1/3/5/7/10-year terms; Advanced offers 1/3/5-year terms only (no 7/10y) — confirmed uniform across all three port classes.

MS130 subscription license structure (regime meraki-subscription, shape subscription-based, term_years null): LIC-MS-100-{S,M,L}-{E,A}, tier-split per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-{M,L}-{E,A} convention. MS100 Small = compact class (8/12-port models); MS100 Medium = 24-port class; MS100 Large = 48-port class.

Tier vocabulary: MS130's own tier names are Enterprise/Advanced; mapped to the registry's existing essentials/advantage legal_values (Enterprise->essentials, Advanced->advantage), same mapping convention used for C9200L-M. No new license_tier axis value.

port_class on the compact-class license catalog entries and groups is recorded as null (not 8), since that class spans two distinct port counts (8-port and 12-port models) and the schema's port_class field is a single integer-or-null.
A trailing 'MS120' line at the end of the user's pasted subscription table was confirmed to be a paste artifact (not MS130 data) and is not reflected anywhere in this file.

catalog._comment: Atomic SKU facts. One row per real orderable component. What a thing IS, independent of which switch uses it.

licenses.notes: Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-CMPT (MS130 classic license table, Enterprise tier, 'compact switch (8/12)' row) and states Enterprise is offered in 1/3/5/7/10-year terms. Covers MS130-8/-8P/-8P-I/-8X/-12X (shared SKU family spanning both 8- and 12-port compact models; port_class recorded as null).
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPT-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPT-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (7-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPT-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (10-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPT-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-CMPTA (MS130 classic license table, Advanced tier, 'compact switch (8/12)' row) and states Advanced is offered in 1/3/5-year terms (no 7/10y). Covers MS130-8/-8P/-8P-I/-8X/-12X (shared SKU family spanning both 8- and 12-port compact models; port_class recorded as null).
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPTA-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-CMPTA-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-24 (MS130 classic license table, Enterprise tier, '24 ports' row) and states Enterprise is offered in 1/3/5/7/10-year terms. Covers MS130-24/-24P/-24X.
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-24-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-24-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (7-year); see LIC-MS130-24-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (10-year); see LIC-MS130-24-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-24A (MS130 classic license table, Advanced tier, '24 ports' row) and states Advanced is offered in 1/3/5-year terms (no 7/10y). Covers MS130-24/-24P/-24X.
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-24A-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-24A-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-48 (MS130 classic license table, Enterprise tier, '48 ports' row) and states Enterprise is offered in 1/3/5/7/10-year terms. Covers MS130-48/-48P/-48X.
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-48-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-48-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (7-year); see LIC-MS130-48-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (10-year); see LIC-MS130-48-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Term suffix synthesized (1-year); datasheet prints only base order code LIC-MS130-48A (MS130 classic license table, Advanced tier, '48 ports' row) and states Advanced is offered in 1/3/5-year terms (no 7/10y). Covers MS130-48/-48P/-48X.
Term suffix synthesized (3-year); see LIC-MS130-48A-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.
Term suffix synthesized (5-year); see LIC-MS130-48A-1Y for base-code and coverage provenance.

Tier suffix synthesized (Essentials); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Small' / LIC-MS-100-S covering the compact class (MS130-8/-8P/-8P-I/-8X/-12X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.

Tier suffix synthesized (Advantage); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Small' / LIC-MS-100-S covering the compact class (MS130-8/-8P/-8P-I/-8X/-12X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.

Tier suffix synthesized (Essentials); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Medium' / LIC-MS-100-M covering the 24-port class (MS130-24/-24P/-24X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.

Tier suffix synthesized (Advantage); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Medium' / LIC-MS-100-M covering the 24-port class (MS130-24/-24P/-24X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.

Tier suffix synthesized (Essentials); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Large' / LIC-MS-100-L covering the 48-port class (MS130-48/-48P/-48X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.
Tier suffix synthesized (Advantage); datasheet prints only base order code 'MS100 Large' / LIC-MS-100-L covering the 48-port class (MS130-48/-48P/-48X), per the C9200L-M LIC-MS-200-M-E/-A convention.

groups._comment: Named shared compatibility sets referencing catalog SKUs by id.

license_groups.applies_to: MS130-8, MS130-8P, MS130-8P-I, MS130-8X, MS130-12X (compact class, Enterprise tier, LIC-MS130-CMPT) (MS130 Datasheet, classic license table).

term_variable.notes: Term length is a downstream config VARIABLE (not a registry axis); the pick resolves the concrete -<n>Y subscription SKU. No perpetual option. Per-term SKUs synthesized (datasheet prints only the base order code LIC-MS130-CMPT and states 1/3/5/7/10-year terms are offered for Enterprise).

license_groups.applies_to: MS130-8, MS130-8P, MS130-8P-I, MS130-8X, MS130-12X (compact class, Advanced tier, LIC-MS130-CMPTA) (MS130 Datasheet, classic license table).
